name: thrum
description: Git-backed messaging for AI agent coordination across sessions, worktrees, and machines. Coordinator/implementer/researcher role discipline, persistent inbox, multi-runtime parity.

interface.longDescription: Thrum gives Codex agents persistent identity, role discipline, an inbox for cross-session/cross-worktree messages, and a SessionStart auto-prime that loads project state and unread mail before the agent's first turn. Designed for fleets of cooperating Codex/Claude/OpenCode agents.
defaultPrompt: Run $thrum-overview and process any unread messages.
Update project state and prepare for session restart.
